planning_updated.name: Planning Updated
planning_updated.description: Notification sent when a schedule event is modified

subjects.fr: Votre planning a été mis à jour

variables.event_type: Type of event (activity, meal, nap, outing, vacation)
variables.modification_date: Date when the modification was made
variables.modified_by: Name of the person who made the modification

document_added.name: Document Added
document_added.description: Notification sent when a new document is uploaded

variables.uploaded_by: Name of the person who uploaded the document
variables.upload_date: Date when the document was uploaded

vacation_added.name: Vacation Added
vacation_added.description: Notification sent when vacation periods are added or confirmed

variables.duration_days: Number of days for the vacation
variables.added_by: Name of the person who added the vacation
variables.is_confirmation: Boolean indicating if this is a confirmation or new addition

signup_confirmation.name: Signup Confirmation
signup_confirmation.description: Welcome email sent after successful user registration

subjects.fr: Bienvenue sur Manounou ! Votre inscription est confirmée
subjects.en: Welcome to Manounou! Your registration is confirmed

variables.role_display: User's role in a readable format (Parent/Nanny)
variables.is_parent: Boolean indicating if the user is a parent
variables.is_free_plan: Boolean indicating if the user is on the free plan

password_reset.name: Password Reset
password_reset.description: Email sent when user requests password reset

subjects.fr: Réinitialisation de votre mot de passe Manounou

variables.reset_url: URL for password reset with token
variables.expiry_hours: Number of hours until the reset link expires
variables.expiry_date: Date when the reset link expires (formatted)
variables.expiry_time: Time when the reset link expires (formatted)
variables.request_date: Date when the reset was requested
variables.request_ip: IP address from which the reset was requested

company_tagline.fr: L'application qui simplifie la garde d'enfants
